source: use anchor_lang::prelude::*; #[program] pub mod bad_auth { use super::*; pub fn withdraw(ctx: Context<Withdraw>) -> Result<()> { Ok(()) } } #[derive(Accounts)] pub struct Withdraw<'info> { pub authority: AccountInfo<'info>, #[account(mut)] pub vault: AccountInfo<'info> }
use anchor_lang::prelude::*; #[derive(Accounts)] pub struct Update<'info> { #[account(mut)] pub config: AccountInfo<'info>, pub authority: Signer<'info> }
